article.title: U.S. gov't orders Anthropic to disable its newest AI models worldwide due to security threats — ban on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 bars access by any foreign national, even its own employees
article.summary: Anthropic disabled its two most capable AI models, Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5, for every customer worldwide on Friday.
article.title_zh: 美國政府命令 Anthropic 在全球停用最新 AI 模型，原因為安全威脅——禁用 Claude Fable 5 和 Mythos 5，禁止任何外國人甚至其員工訪問
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 於週五全球停用了最強大的兩款 AI 模型 Claude Fable 5 和 Claude Mythos 5。

article.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
article.summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 的安全警告可能適得其反——政府已關閉其最強大的 AI
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 明確表示不滿，聲稱「發現狹隘的潛在越獄問題不應成為召回部署給數億人的商業模型的理由」。

article.title: Google AI Mode starts rolling out Search agents that keep track of information for you
article.summary: At I/O 2026, Google announced the concept of “Search agents,” with information agents now rolling out in AI Mode for AI Ultra subscribers.
article.title_zh: Google AI Mode 開始推出搜索代理，為用戶追蹤信息
article.summary_zh: Google 在 I/O 2026 宣布推出「搜索代理」概念，現已向 AI Ultra 訂閱者推出。

article.title: Apple explains the goal of iOS 27’s new AI features in Photos
article.summary: The Photos app is a central focus of iOS 27, adding new features like Reframe and Extend. In a new interview with Tyler Stalman , two Apple Photos executives went in-depth on the new features and what they mean for photographers.
article.title_zh: Apple 解釋 iOS 27 Photos 應用新 AI 功能的目標
article.summary_zh: Photos 應用是 iOS 27 的重點，新增了 Reframe 和 Extend 等功能；Apple 高管詳細介紹了這些新功能的含義。

article.title: Intel reportedly preparing surprise return to DDR4 systems with 'Raptor Lake Next' — LGA 1700 platform apparently slated for first half of 2027, takes a page from AMD's book by extending budget platform longevity
article.summary: The name came up a few times during our conversations at Computex. Intel has declined to comment on it.
article.title_zh: Intel 據報準備推出驚人回歸方案，以「Raptor Lake Next」重返 DDR4 系統——LGA 1700 平台預計 2027 年上半年推出，效仿 AMD 延長預算平台壽命
article.summary_zh: 該名稱在 Computex 期間的多次對話中出現，但 Intel 拒絕發表評論。

article.title: Anthropic 被政府命令九十分鐘內下架最新 AI 模型，背後到底發生什麼事？
article.summary: 在生成式 AI 發展的戰場上，一場突如其來的「國安危機」正引爆華府與矽谷的劇烈摩擦。 《AXIOS》引述 An […]
article.title_zh: Anthropic 被政府命令九十分鐘內下架最新 AI 模型，背後到底發生什麼事？
article.summary_zh: 在生成式 AI 發展的戰場上，一場突如其來的「國安危機」正引爆華府與矽谷的劇烈摩擦。 《AXIOS》引述 An […]

article.title: Meta Employees Absolutely Hate Mark Zuckerberg’s Plan for a Companywide AI Hackathon
article.summary: “I’m not sure that this company supports a hackathon culture anymore,” one employee posted in a forum open to the entire staff.
article.title_zh: Meta Employees Absolutely Hate Mark Zuckerberg’s Plan for a Companywide AI Hackathon
article.summary_zh: “I’m not sure that this company supports a hackathon culture anymore,” one employee posted in a forum open to the entire staff.

article.title: 外國人禁用最高階 AI 模型！美商務部出手限制 Anthropic 存取權限
article.summary: AI 開發商 Anthropic 週五（12 日）表示，美國政府以國家安全為由，下令要求暫停向外國公民提供最先 […]
article.title_zh: 外國人禁用最高階 AI 模型！美商務部出手限制 Anthropic 存取權限
article.summary_zh: AI 開發商 Anthropic 週五（12 日）表示，美國政府以國家安全為由，下令要求暫停向外國公民提供最先 […]

article.title: AMD challenges Nvidia's DGX Spark with $3,999 Ryzen AI Halo with Windows 11 support — Strix Halo desktop undercuts Nvidia by $700, packs 128GB of unified memory
article.summary: Powered by the Ryzen AI Max+ 395 processor and 128GB of unified memory, AMD's developer kit arrives as a direct competitor to Nvidia's DGX Spark, which recently saw a price increase to $4,699.
article.title_zh: AMD 以 $3,999 的 Ryzen AI Halo 挑戰 Nvidia DGX Spark，支援 Windows 11——Strix Halo 桌機比 Nvidia 便宜 $700，配備 128GB 統一記憶體
article.summary_zh: 搭載 Ryzen AI Max+ 395 處理器和 128GB 統一記憶體的 AMD 開發套件，作為 Nvidia DGX Spark 的直接競爭產品登場，而 Nvidia 產品近日已漲至 $4,699。

article.title: AI costs spike as subscriptions hit pricing wall — firms turn towards Chinese LLMs, open-source models to extend budget
article.summary: Companies look for cheaper alternatives as token costs for frontier AI models skyrocket, potentially impacting OpenAI and Anthropic's bottom lines. Subscriptions also take a bite out of these startup's profitability, as utilization rates higher than 5.7% could lead to losses.
article.title_zh: AI 成本飆升，訂閱服務觸及定價天花板——企業轉向中國 LLM 和開源模型以延長預算
article.summary_zh: 隨著尖端 AI 模型的 token 成本飆漲，企業尋求更便宜的替代方案，可能衝擊 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的利潤；訂閱服務也蠶食新創公司利潤，利用率超過 5.7% 恐導致虧損。

article.title: The US government just forced Anthropic to pull its most advanced AI models
article.summary: Credit: Calvin Wankhede / Android Authority TL;DR The US government issued an emergency export control directive forcing Anthropic to immediately suspend access to its flagship Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models for all foreign nationals due to national security concerns. To guarantee absolute compliance with the order, Anthropic had to completely disable both models for all customers worldwide, including domestic US citizens. The restriction stems from a codebase “jailbreak” exploit that allows users to use these models to scan for software vulnerabilities. Anthropic strongly pushes back, arguing the flaw is minor, present in competitor models like GPT-5.5, and shouldn’t trigger a commercial blackout. In a stunning and unprecedented move, the US government has issued an emergency export contr
article.title_zh: 美國政府強制 Anthropic 下架其最先進的 AI 模型
article.summary_zh: 美國政府下達緊急出口管制指令，強制 Anthropic 立即暫停外國用戶對 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 AI 模型的訪問權限。

article.title: Here’s How AI Agents Can Protect EV Chargers
article.summary: An AI agent system proposed by researchers in Spain promises to prevent energy theft and damage to EV chargers, as well as the critical energy infrastructure that powers them.
article.title_zh: AI 代理如何保護電動汽車充電器
article.summary_zh: 西班牙研究人員提出的 AI 代理系統承諾防止電動汽車充電器被盜電和損毀，以及支撐它們的關鍵能源基礎設施。
